7 AND 70

Applying to 00110111
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 56 = AND(I 5,I 6) = AND(1,1) = 1
1 AND 67 = AND(I 6,I 7) = AND(1,1) = 1
2 AND 70 = AND(I 7,I 0) = AND(1,0) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 AND 70 = AND(I 7,I 0) = AND(1,0) = 0

\boxed{11000000}
